findings.description: `Throwable` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the `onError` method signature (`onError(Throwable e, RequestMessage request, ExecutionContext context)`) in the source. It is absent from hints in both s3 (クラス構造) and s4 (メソッド詳細).
findings.source_evidence: .. function:: ResponseMessage onError(Throwable e, RequestMessage request, ExecutionContext context)
